name: overlay-hint
title: Overlay Hint
description: Tokenized instruction pill with default frosted glass, a muted chip, and a marquee variant with scrolling text, trailing icon action, and sm or md density.

api.description: Instruction or status pill for tool chrome. Default is frosted glass that follows light and dark surfaces. Muted is a solid chip. Marquee scrolls the label with an optional trailing icon action and sm or md density. Chrome is tokenized via --overlay-hint-*.

props.name: variant
props.description: default frosted glass that adapts under a .dark surface. muted solid surface chip. marquee scrolling label with an optional trailing icon action.

props.name: scheme
props.description: Explicit light or dark recipe for marquee. When omitted, marquee follows a .dark ancestor like default.

props.name: speed
props.description: Marquee loop duration in seconds. Smaller values scroll faster. Sets --overlay-hint-marquee-duration.

props.name: marqueeWidth
props.description: Visible marquee viewport width. Any CSS length such as 10rem or 14rem. Theme default is 12rem. Sets --overlay-hint-marquee-width.

props.name: clickTarget
props.description: Marquee hit target. chip makes the whole hint clickable; the trailing icon is decorative. action limits clicks to the trailing control only.

props.name: size
props.description: Marquee density only. md is the default chip. sm tightens padding, uses text-11 type, and shrinks the trailing control for compact tool chrome. Ignored on default and muted.

props.name: action
props.description: Icon for the trailing marquee control. Renders as a kit icon-only Button (size icon-xs, variant secondary). Decorative when clickTarget is chip; interactive when clickTarget is action.

props.name: actionLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the interactive control (whole chip or trailing action).

props.name: onAction
props.description: Click handler when the interactive control renders as a button.

props.name: actionHref
props.description: When set, the interactive control renders as a link instead of a button.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius for the hint chip: none square, md soft, full pill. Three steps kept distinct. Trailing marquee control uses the Button radius. Maps to --overlay-hint-radius.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Instance corner curve. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme (set at create/init).

props.name: background
props.description: Background color. Prefer tokens such as var(--df-neutral-900). Sets --overlay-hint-bg.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: Border color. Prefer tokens such as var(--border). Sets --overlay-hint-border.

props.name: foreground
props.description: Label color. Prefer tokens such as var(--muted-foreground). Sets --overlay-hint-fg.

props.name: shadow
props.description: Box shadow. Prefer tokens such as var(--overlay-shadow) or none. Sets --overlay-hint-shadow.

props.name: blur
props.description: Backdrop blur length. Prefer tokens such as var(--overlay-blur) or 0px. Sets --overlay-hint-blur.

props.name: parts
props.description: Label segments joined by separator. Prefer this for multi-part hints. When set, children is ignored.

props.name: separator
props.description: Node between parts. Defaults to the middle-dot constant. Pass a glyph, icon, or custom divider. Set null to omit.

props.name: children
props.description: Single-label hint. Use parts instead when you need a separator between segments.

props.name: leading
props.description: Optional icon, swatch, or node before the label.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Optional icon or node after the label.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles. On dark canvases without a .dark ancestor, pass className="dark" so default frosted uses the dark recipe.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles. Override --overlay-hint-bg, --overlay-hint-border, --overlay-hint-fg, --overlay-hint-shadow, --overlay-hint-blur, or --overlay-hint-radius directly.

props.name: …HTML attributes
props.description: Standard element attributes (id, title, aria-*, etc.).

groups.title: Exports
groups.description: Named exports from the Overlay Hint module.

props.name: OverlayHint
props.description: The hint pill component.

props.name: OVERLAY_HINT_SEPARATOR
props.description: Default middle-dot separator constant. Reuse when you want the stock separator explicitly.

props.name: OverlayHintSize
props.description: Marquee density type. sm is compact; md is the default.

props.name: OverlayHintClickTarget
props.description: Marquee hit target type. chip is the whole hint; action is the trailing control only.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or set the instance vars via props or style.

props.name: --overlay-hint-radius
props.description: Corner radius used by the hint.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.

props.name: --overlay-hint-bg
props.description: Resolved fill for the active surface.

props.name: --overlay-hint-border
props.description: Resolved border color.

props.name: --overlay-hint-fg
props.description: Resolved label color.

props.name: --overlay-hint-shadow
props.description: Resolved box shadow.

props.name: --overlay-hint-blur
props.description: Resolved backdrop blur.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-bg
props.description: Default frosted fill on light surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-border
props.description: Default frosted border on light surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-fg
props.description: Default frosted label on light surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-shadow
props.description: Default frosted shadow on light surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-blur
props.description: Default frosted blur on light surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-dark-bg
props.description: Default frosted fill on .dark surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-dark-border
props.description: Default frosted border on .dark surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-dark-fg
props.description: Default frosted label on .dark surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-dark-shadow
props.description: Default frosted shadow on .dark surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-default-dark-blur
props.description: Default frosted blur on .dark surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-muted-bg
props.description: Muted variant fill.

props.name: --overlay-hint-muted-border
props.description: Muted variant border.

props.name: --overlay-hint-muted-fg
props.description: Muted variant label.

props.name: --overlay-hint-muted-shadow
props.description: Muted variant shadow.

props.name: --overlay-hint-muted-blur
props.description: Muted variant blur.

props.name: --overlay-hint-marquee-duration
props.description: One full marquee loop duration.

props.name: --overlay-hint-marquee-width
props.description: Visible marquee viewport width.

props.name: --overlay-hint-marquee-bg
props.description: Marquee fill on light surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-marquee-dark-bg
props.description: Marquee fill on dark surfaces.

props.name: --overlay-hint-marquee-gap
props.description: Gap between repeated marquee label segments.

props.name: --overlay-hint-marquee-fade
props.description: Soft edge fade depth for the scrolling label, on both sides.
